About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC is displaying exceptional long-term momentum characteristics, ranking #1 with a composite score of 95.5, driven by extraordinary 10-year returns of 1,289.71% and consistent outperformance across all timeframes (127.98% vs SPY over 1y, 416.85% over 5y). The stock passes 4 of 5 ratio tests and trades above all major moving averages with a "strong_buy" signal and "clean" momentum flag, though its 1.917 volatility ratio indicates notably higher risk than the broad market. In contrast, CF shows moderating momentum with only 3 ratio passes and a concerning 10-year underperformance vs QQQ (-190.07%), despite strong recent 1-month returns of 29.11% and passing all SMA tests. LINC's correlation profile is dominated by materials (XLB at 0.322) and industrials, while CF shows weaker cross-sector momentum signals, suggesting LINC has broader fundamental support while CF's gains may be more cyclical and potentially vulnerable.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
